brand_identity.name: AdVantage Studio
brand_identity.core_philosophy: The UI should feel like a high-end camera lens: precise, mechanical, and invisible until you need it.
brand_identity.visual_mood: Swiss & High-Contrast. Stark white canvas, obsidian tools, electric accents.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and campaign names.

styles.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none text-zinc-900
styles.label: text-xs font-bold tracking-widest uppercase text-zinc-500

body.usage: Use for all inputs, ad copy previews, and interface text. Excellent for numbers.

primary.description: Zinc 950. Used for primary actions, sidebar backgrounds, and strong emphasis.

secondary.description: Zinc 100. Used for button backgrounds (ghost), panel backgrounds.

accent.description: Indigo 600. 'Electric Indigo'. Used for active states, toggles, and 'Generate/Export' actions.

grid_system.sidebar: lg:col-span-3 xl:col-span-3 border-r border-zinc-200 bg-white h-full overflow-y-auto z-10
grid_system.main_stage: lg:col-span-9 xl:col-span-9 bg-zinc-50/50 h-full overflow-y-auto relative flex flex-col

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-900 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 shadow-lg shadow-zinc-900/20 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-50 hover:border-zinc-300 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium

cards.base: bg-white border border-zinc-200 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-6
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-zinc-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-zinc-300 rounded-xl p-6 transition-all cursor-pointer group
cards.preview_container: bg-white shadow-2xl shadow-zinc-200/50 border border-zinc-100 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden transform transition-all duration-500

inputs.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-lg border border-zinc-200 bg-zinc-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-zinc-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-500/20 focus-visible:border-indigo-500 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all shadow-sm
inputs.label: text-xs font-semibold text-zinc-900 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 block

logos.twitter: Use React Icons: FaTwitter (or X icon)

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: yarn add react-icons html-to-image jspdf
DO NOT create a separate 'Preview' page. The preview must be live on the dashboard (Right or Center panel).
THE AD COMPONENT: Create a single 'AdPreview' component that accepts a 'platform' prop. Inside, switch between sub-components like <FacebookPreview>, <InstagramPreview> etc.
REALISM IS KEY: The preview components must identically match the DOM structure of the real platforms (User avatar top left, three dots right, image full width, reaction bar below).
DRAG & DROP: Use a robust file upload area in the Left Sidebar. 'Drop visuals here'.
NO AUTH: Do not build login screens. Land directly on the Dashboard.
EXPORT: Implement 'Download PNG' using 'html-to-image' library targeting the preview container ref.
MOBILE TOGGLE: Add a pill switch 'Mobile | Desktop' above the preview canvas that resizes the preview container.
universal_guidelines: Never use gradients for main backgrounds, only for subtle accents.
Do not center text in the sidebar; keep it left-aligned for readability.
All interactive elements must have a hover state that changes background or text color.
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (e.g., 'Image Uploaded', 'Export Complete').
